name: Rock Credit and Business Services
description_short: Texas-based credit repair firm offering dispute services, tax preparation, and business credit building. Licensed, bonded, and locally owned in Round Rock.
description_long:
Rock Credit and Business Services is a Texas-based credit repair company founded and owned by Shane and Angie Whitted, lifelong Texans operating from Round Rock. The company claims decades of combined experience in the credit repair industry and positions itself as a hands-on, personalized alternative to national chains. They emphasize direct communication via phone, email, and in-person consultations at their local office.

The company's core service is credit repair—disputing errors and negative items to improve credit scores. Beyond credit repair, they offer tax preparation services, business credit building, and LLC formation assistance. They explicitly highlight relationships with mortgage lenders and realtors, positioning credit repair as a pathway to home buying. Marketing materials claim clients have successfully secured mortgages and purchased homes after using their services.

The company distinguishes itself through Texas-specific credentialing (certified and bonded through the Texas Secretary of State) and local accessibility. They target both individual consumers seeking homeownership and small business owners needing credit support. Testimonials on their site reference improved credit scores leading to mortgage approval and business growth.

A key limitation is that the website provides no specific details about their credit repair methodology, dispute process, expected timelines, or pricing structure. While they claim over 20 years of experience, no independent verification, licensing numbers, or detailed service descriptions are available. The company operates in a heavily regulated industry (credit repair), yet their online presence lacks transparency around processes, fees, or realistic outcome expectations—standard information for evaluating credit repair legitimacy.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Certified and bonded through Texas Secretary of State, providing regulatory verification
Local Round Rock office with scheduled in-person consultations available, not online-only
Claims strong relationships with mortgage lenders and realtors for home-buying support
Offers bundled services (credit repair, tax prep, LLC formation, business credit) beyond dispute work
Owned by Texas residents with stated decades of combined industry experience
Multiple contact channels: phone (512-871-0959), email, and in-person consultation options
Customer testimonials reference successful mortgage approval and business growth outcomes
cons: Website contains no pricing information, fee structure, or cost estimates for any services
No timeline expectations disclosed for credit score improvements or dispute resolution
Lacks detailed explanation of their credit repair methodology or dispute process
No independent verification, Better Business Bureau rating, or third-party review links provided
Marketing materials make broad claims ('fast, effective results') without substantiation or case studies with metrics
best_for: Texas residents seeking local, in-person credit repair support with face-to-face consultations
Consumers preparing to buy a home who want credit improvement bundled with realtor/lender referrals
Small business owners needing credit repair alongside business credit building and LLC formation
Individuals preferring phone and email communication with a local, owner-operated firm over national chains
diagnosis: Rock Credit and Business Services is best for Texas-based consumers seeking personalized, local credit repair with the option for in-person consultations and those pursuing home purchases who benefit from lender/realtor connections. The primary caveat is the complete absence of pricing, timelines, and detailed process information on their website—essential factors for evaluating credit repair companies—which limits ability to assess value, legitimacy, and realistic outcomes before engagement.
services: Credit repair and credit score restoration
Dispute of errors and negative items on credit reports
Business credit building and strategic credit approaches
In-person consultations at Round Rock office
Mortgage readiness support and lender referrals
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 17004 Joe Barbee Dr Suite 100, Round Rock, TX 78664
